title: Easter Rabbit Life
description: Rabbits will drop easter eggs then can be used to give you some new items.
body:
Rabbits will lay down easter eggs every 6-9 minutes.

After using these eggs they will give you a random item.

 

#### Random Items are:

-Chocolate Egg (50% chance for a random potion effect and heals 2 health)

-Easter Egg Wand (transform to rabbit on use, second use will cancel the transform and tempts rabbits while holding)

-piece of cloth (easter outfit material)

 

#### Potion effects:

-duration is random from 15 sec to 120

-damage boost, damage resistance, absorption, haste, health boost, levitation, luck, regeneration, night vision

 

#### Easter clothing:

-bunny ears (dyeable)
